description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Create a new customer account and then add a dog profile that includes basic details plus health information, a veterinarian contact, and an emergency contact.

tasks.instruction: In the site’s policies or FAQ, find the vaccination requirements that apply specifically to boarding stays longer than 3 nights and copy that paragraph of text.

target_names: Boarding stays longer than 3 nights vaccination requirement

expected_values.paragraph_text: For boarding stays longer than 3 nights, dogs must have up-to-date Rabies, Distemper/Parvo (DHPP), and Bordetella vaccinations administered by a licensed veterinarian within the past 12 months (Bordetella within the past 6 months). Written proof (veterinary receipt, printout, or official app record) is required at or before check-in for extended stays.
